MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-13-2024 Vacated

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-24-2024 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Ross Madden, Esq. 415-567-1212 for Plaintiff.
David Tate, Esq. 415-613-9713 for Defendant.

Hearing is held. RULING - A R G U E D. Mr Tate apprises the Court re: a supplemental pleading filed on April 19, 2024 and requests to cotinue the matter. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

David W. Tate's Motion to be relieved as Counsel for DEFENDANT LESLIE ANDERSON-ADAMS.

Off-calendar. Counsel can reset the hearing to another date.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/rbu)
